series_metadata.series_title: Uniform Accounting Network Employee Flex-Time Form and Timesheet
series_metadata.series_description: UAN employees use this form to sign in and sign out (lunch hours included) indicating arrival time and departure time for each day.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
